items.title: How can I view a competition Leaderboard?
items.description: A leaderboard shows the comparative ranking of each participant in your competition. Leaderboards can be of individual participants and teams as well.

items.title: How do I view the KPI scorecard?
items.description: A Scorecard is a collection of KPIs that's being tracked. Scorecards can be either Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly or Yearly.
